scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run db:up && pnpm run migrate && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.start:dev: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d && pnpm -r --parallel --filter api --filter web run dev
scripts.migrate: pnpm --dir apps/api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:status: pnpm --dir apps/api exec prisma migrate status
scripts.build: pnpm run api:build && pnpm run web:build
scripts.format: pnpm --dir apps/api run format && pnpm --dir apps/api exec prettier --write "../web/src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}"
